title: MENTAL HEALTH THERAPIES - 211info
text: NEUROTHERAPEUTIC PEDIATRIC THERAPIES CLACKAMAS MENTAL HEALTH THERAPIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health treatment for children, individuals, couples, and families. Uses an evidenced-based, solution-focused approach and provides an environment in which families and individuals can thrive and succeed in their communities. Services include individual, couples, and family therapy; parent and family coaching; play therapy; nature based therapy, foster and adoptive family therapy, and more. Telehealth services available. 14839 SE 82nd Drive Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm; limited 8am and 5pm appointments may be available Email (503) 371-5146 6 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 372-5417 Ext: 6 Main phone Main phone (503) 371-5146 ext 6 Care Coordinator Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Existing clients may request financial assistance for therapy costs. Scholarships are dependent on fund availability. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Tillamook, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near TriMet bus line Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - OCCUPATIONAL AND PHYSICAL THERAPY REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - SPEECH THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
